messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).

No, Socrates did not write the Symposium (會飲篇). Socrates left no written works of his own — everything we know of his philosophy comes through the writings of others, most notably his student Plato. The Symposium was written by Plato, who features Socrates as a prominent character within the dialogue. Attributing the Symposium to Socrates would be incorrect; Plato is the author.
